Track_Parameters.name: Reverse
Track_Parameters.description: Specifies whether to play back normally or in reverse.

Track_Parameters.name: 1Shot
Track_Parameters.description: Specifies whether to play as a one-shot sample or as a normal loop.

Track_Parameters.name: Pan
Track_Parameters.description: Specifies the stereo position (pan) of the track.

Track_Parameters.name: Play Level
Track_Parameters.description: Adjusts the playback volume of the track.

Track_Parameters.name: Start Mode
Track_Parameters.description: Specifies whether playback starts immediately or fades in.

Track_Parameters.name: Measure
Track_Parameters.description: Specifies the number of measures in the track. Available when Loop Sync is ON.

Track_Parameters.name: Loop Sync Switch
Track_Parameters.description: Specifies whether to use loop synchronization.

Track_Parameters.name: Tempo Sync Switch
Track_Parameters.description: Specifies whether to play at original tempo or synchronized tempo.

Track_Parameters.name: Input Routing
Track_Parameters.description: Specifies which inputs are recorded to the track.

Rhythm_Parameters.name: Genre
Rhythm_Parameters.description: Selects the genre of the rhythm pattern.

Rhythm_Parameters.name: Kit
Rhythm_Parameters.description: Selects the drum kit used for the rhythm.

Rhythm_Parameters.name: Fill
Rhythm_Parameters.description: Specifies whether to play a fill-in.

Rhythm_Parameters.name: Part 1-4 Level
Rhythm_Parameters.description: Adjusts the volume of each rhythm part (Kick, Snare, Hi-Hat, Other).

Memory_Parameters.name: Memory Level
Memory_Parameters.description: Adjusts the overall volume of the memory.

Memory_Parameters.name: Tempo
Memory_Parameters.description: Sets the tempo for the memory.

Note: Effect parameters are dependent on the specific effect type selected and are detailed in the 'Parameter Guide', not the User Manual.
